summary: Full RBAC + Fusion skeleton review (iteration_13). Backend: 46/46 new RBAC pytest cases PASSED (test_rbac.py, 10.12s) covering verify_admin / verify_admin_or_supervisor, all /admin/* read endpoints (admin + supervisor allowed, officer blocked), write endpoints (approve/reject/cache-cleanup/role) admin-only, /auth/profile role+is_admin fields, and /admin/officers/{id}/role promote/demote flow with self-demote 400, invalid role 400, missing officer 404, and persistence via GET /admin/officers. Regression: test_triple_fusion_queue.py 9/9 PASSED unchanged. Frontend: pc72 admin dashboard shows 5 tabs incl. 'Manage Roles' with 12 officer rows each exposing officer/supervisor/admin buttons; role-badge=ADMIN; header='Admin Dashboard'. DEMO001 supervisor dashboard shows 4 tabs (no Manage Roles), header='Supervisor Dashboard', role-badge=SUPERVISOR, approve/reject replaced with 'Read-only (Supervisor)' lock text (0 approve buttons visible), cache-cleanup button is disabled. Fusion skeleton: after clicking generate-fusion-btn with a staged PDF, fusion-empty-state is removed and fusion-skeleton + skeleton-progress-bar + skeleton-progress-percent + skeleton-stage-text are all rendered; job completes and skeleton is replaced with real charge-sheet HTML (credits used=5 observed in header).

issues: React hydration warning: <span> appears as a direct child of <tbody>/<tr>. Invalid HTML nesting near the 'Read-only (Supervisor)' lock indicator (console errors: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <tbody>', '<tr> <span>'). Functional but should wrap the lock text in a <td> inside a <tr>.

skeleton-progress-bar is a width:0 div while progress=0%, so Playwright marks it non-visible (it is in DOM). Consider min-w-[2px] or hiding until progress>0 to avoid confusing zero-state. Not a functional issue.

action_items: Fix invalid HTML nesting in AdminDashboard pending-users row: wrap the 'Read-only (Supervisor)' <span> inside a <td> rather than directly under <tr>/<tbody> to eliminate React hydration warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: RBAC implementation is clean: _get_officer_role backfills legacy is_admin=True to role='admin', so existing admins don't break. verify_admin_or_supervisor consistently applied to all 10 read endpoints; verify_admin gates every write endpoint.
admin_set_role is correct: blocks self-demotion, validates role whitelist, auto-approves when promoting to admin/supervisor, and keeps is_admin boolean in sync. Target-not-found returns 404.
/admin/officers strips _id / password / password_hash and normalizes legacy rows missing role — good defensive handling.
/auth/profile response schema extended with role + is_admin; Login response also includes them (officer_doc.get('role', fallback by is_admin)).
Frontend AdminDashboard re-fetches /auth/profile on mount to refresh role without requiring re-login after promotion — good UX.
FusionSkeleton is a pure presentational component that takes progress+stage props; correctly swapped in at L653 of ChargeSheetFusion.js when isGenerating=true, pushing empty-state out.
Minor nit: server.py is ~3383 lines; /admin/* section (~300 lines) could be extracted into routers/admin.py for maintainability (>700-line rule).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 flows: admin dashboard, supervisor dashboard, fusion skeleton)

test_credentials: pc72/Test123! (admin), TEST001/Test123! (admin), DEMO001/Test123! (supervisor), TEST002/Test123! (officer — password reset during setup, approval_status APPROVED).
seed_data_creation: Reset TEST002 password_hash to bcrypt('Test123!') and set role=officer, approval_status=APPROVED so officer-level 403 tests could run. TEST002 is temporarily promoted to supervisor/admin and reverted to officer by the role-management test cases (idempotent cleanup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC + role management + Fusion skeleton are fully verified end-to-end. test_rbac.py is idempotent (promotes TEST002 then demotes back to officer), safe to re-run. If adding new /admin/* endpoints, extend the READ_ENDPOINTS parametrize list in test_rbac.py. Known non-blocking: HTML nesting warning in AdminDashboard pending table; skeleton-progress-bar has width:0 at progress=0.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs reproduced. The supervisor/admin RBAC and Fusion skeleton are working as designed.
